_meta.purpose: Curated real Malaysian student workshops, hackathons, competitions and career fairs. Upserted into the `events` table on boot (edit + restart to refresh). Matched to the user's profile by tag overlap, exactly like modules/targets. We NEVER host these - each row links to the official page.
_meta.honesty: Dates and deadlines drift every year. Every entry carries lastVerified and the UI shows a 'verify on the official site' note. Most are recurring annual events, so `date` is often a season rather than an exact day.

events.title: National Career & Postgraduate Fair
events.date: Multiple editions each year (KL, Penang, JB)
events.blurb: Meet employers and universities under one roof, sit for on-the-spot interviews, and join career talks. Good first stop for any student mapping options.

events.title: GRADUAN ASPIRE Career Fair
events.blurb: One of Malaysia's largest graduate recruitment fairs - top employers, management-trainee programmes and CV clinics for final-year students and fresh grads.

events.title: Maybank GO Ahead Challenge
events.deadline: Applications typically open early in the year
events.blurb: A global business case challenge for undergraduates - problem-solving under pressure, with fast-track recruitment for standout performers.

events.title: L'Oreal Brandstorm
events.date: Annual (national round early year, global final mid-year)
events.blurb: Innovation and marketing competition - build a product or service concept for a real brand brief. Strong for marketing, business and design students.

events.title: CFA Institute Research Challenge (Malaysia)
events.deadline: Universities enrol teams in the prior semester
events.blurb: Analyse a real listed company and pitch an equity research report to industry judges. The gold standard for finance and investment students.

events.title: Enactus Malaysia National Exposition
events.deadline: Campus teams register through the year
events.blurb: Present a social-entrepreneurship project that creates real community impact. Great for anyone into sustainability, business and social good.

events.title: Shopee Code League
events.deadline: Free registration on the event site
events.blurb: A competitive-programming and data-science contest across Southeast Asia. Solid for CS and analytics students building a portfolio.

events.title: Google Developer Groups Solution Challenge
events.blurb: Build an app that tackles a UN Sustainable Development Goal using Google tech. Beginner-friendly and great for a first real project.

events.title: Microsoft Imagine Cup
events.blurb: The long-running global student startup competition - pitch a tech idea, get mentoring, and compete for funding.

events.title: ASEAN Data Science Explorers
events.blurb: Use data analytics to propose solutions to social issues aligned with the SDGs. Ideal for data, business analytics and social-science students.

events.title: UMHackathon
events.date: Annual (usually first half of the year)
events.deadline: Team sign-up on the event page
events.blurb: One of the country's biggest student hackathons - 24-hour build sprints on real industry problem statements with cash prizes.

events.title: CodeNection
events.blurb: A student-run competitive-programming and hackathon event welcoming beginners - a friendly way to test coding skills against peers nationwide.

events.title: MLH Member Hackathons (global calendar)
events.blurb: A constantly-updated calendar of student hackathons you can join from Malaysia, many fully online and beginner-friendly. Great for building projects fast.

events.title: Devpost Online Hackathons
events.blurb: A searchable directory of open online hackathons across every field - AI, web, design, fintech. Filter by theme and submit a project for prizes.

events.title: Bebras Computational Thinking Challenge
events.blurb: No coding needed - fun logic and problem-solving puzzles that build computational thinking. A great entry point for school students curious about tech.

events.title: F1 in Schools Malaysia
events.deadline: School teams register through the year
events.blurb: Design, build and race a miniature CO2-powered F1 car while running the team like a real business. Blends engineering, design and marketing.

events.title: National Science Challenge
events.deadline: School registration earlier in the year
events.blurb: A national STEM quiz-and-experiment competition for secondary students. Sharpens science knowledge and teamwork under the spotlight.

events.title: Model United Nations (MUN) Conferences
events.blurb: Debate global issues as a delegate representing a country. Builds public speaking, diplomacy, research and negotiation - strong for law, IR and politics.

events.title: Toastmasters Youth / Campus Clubs
events.deadline: Join anytime - find a local club
events.blurb: Structured practice in public speaking and leadership. One of the most reliable ways to build communication confidence for any career.

events.title: Battle of the Chefs / Culinary Challenges
events.blurb: A major regional culinary competition with student and junior categories - a real showcase for aspiring chefs and hospitality students.

events.title: WorldSkills Malaysia
events.blurb: National skills competition across dozens of trades - culinary, hospitality, IT, beauty, welding, automotive and more. Winners can represent Malaysia globally.

events.title: MDEC / Malaysia Digital Programmes & Hackathons
events.blurb: Government-backed digital challenges, upskilling programmes and startup events. A good hub for tech, digital and entrepreneurship opportunities locally.
